steps.title: Understand the function structure
steps.content: The function $y = (72w)(w)$ represents area as a product of two factors. Since area = length $\times$ width, and we're told that length = 72 times the width, the two factors must represent (length) $\times$ (width).

steps.title: Identify what 72w represents
steps.content: The second factor $w$ is the width. The first factor $(72w)$ represents $72 \times w$, which is 72 times the width. The problem states that length = 72 times the width, so $(72w)$ is the length. Therefore, $72w$ is the length of the rectangle, in feet. That matches choice A — A is correct.
